nasb.text: “Now you son of man, get yourself a brick, place it before you and inscribe a city on it, Jerusalem.

esv.text: “And you, son of man, take a brick and lay it before you, and engrave on it a city, even Jerusalem.

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要拿一塊磚頭，放在你面前，在上面刻一座城，代表耶路撒冷。

ccb.text: “人子啊，你去拿一块砖放在自己面前，把耶路撒冷城画在上面。
